## Checklist

- [ ] Grounded in official Microsoft Learn docs (added/updated `docUrl`, and `lastVerified` for scenarios)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run check-docs` passes
- [ ] New tools are registered in `src/tools/index.js` and have a test
- [ ] Keeps the project unofficial (no implied Microsoft affiliation)
